core_mechanism: quantification of deterministic chaos in a conservative (Hamiltonian) dynamical system via the exponential divergence rate of infinitesimally nearby trajectories in phase space (Lyapunov-exponent and related variational sensitivity indicators)
brief_reason: The abstract names Lyapunov exponents, MEGNO, and SALI/GALI as the 'quantitative backbone' for mapping the system's phase space and detecting chaos, all of which measure the rate at which neighbouring trajectories separate under the governing (Hamiltonian) flow.
